hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); f.endswith('.md') and subprocess.run(['npx','prettier','--write',f])" 2>/dev/null || true

missing=""; [ -f ~/.claude/.ponytail-active ] || missing="ponytail "; grep -q caveman ~/.claude/settings.json 2>/dev/null || missing="${missing}caveman "; [ -n "$missing" ] && echo "⚠️  Missing required plugins: ${missing}— install per CLAUDE-SHARED.md" || true
